author: chonghe
content: Not sure if all clients want to emit the second event? At the time of drafting the PR, we keep it as `may`, as we want to make this kind of optional for the bn to emit the event. But if the devs think it is good to emit a second one upon payload_status change, then we can change to `should`

author: nflaig
content:
> Not sure if all clients want to emit the second event? 
we should have consistent behavior, otherwise consumers can't rely on the event, I am in favor of `should`
